title: Clinical Trial
description: Clinical trial registration and status information from ClinicalTrials.gov or equivalent registry.

nct_id.description: ClinicalTrials.gov NCT identifier. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov, trial registry.

title.description: Official title of the clinical trial. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov title field.

sponsor_name.description: Primary sponsor organization. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov sponsor field.

sponsor_type.description: Type of primary sponsor. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov sponsor class.

collaborators.description: List of collaborating organizations. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov collaborators section.

status.description: Current recruitment status of the trial. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov status field.

phase.description: Clinical trial phase. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov phase field.

study_type.description: Type of study design. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov study type field.

conditions.description: Medical conditions or diseases being studied. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov conditions section.

interventions.description: Interventions being tested. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov interventions section.

primary_outcomes.description: Primary outcome measures. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov outcome measures section.

enrollment_target.description: Target number of participants. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov enrollment field.

enrollment_actual.description: Actual number of participants enrolled. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov enrollment field.

start_date.description: Study start date. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov dates section.

primary_completion_date.description: Primary completion date. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov dates section.

locations.description: Study locations. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov locations section.

eligibility_min_age.description: Minimum age for eligibility. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov eligibility criteria.

eligibility_max_age.description: Maximum age for eligibility. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov eligibility criteria.

eligibility_sex.description: Sex eligibility requirement. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov eligibility criteria.

results_available.description: Whether results have been posted. Commonly found in: ClinicalTrials.gov results section.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

Intervention.description: A drug, device, procedure, or other intervention being tested.

type.description: Type of intervention (e.g., Drug, Device, Procedure).

Outcome.description: An outcome measure for the trial.

timeframe.description: Time point at which the outcome is measured.

TrialLocation.description: A facility or site participating in the clinical trial.
